meta.northy_message: Heavy infrastructure day. You shipped Design/Brand v2 to the whole fleet, reversed the self-modification policy, and got all 7 C-levels aligned. But Zig's blind — no live HubSpot data since July 6, and 51 renewal districts are still in 'To Be Renewed' with 6 weeks left. That's the priority, not whether Pixel has GitHub access.

act_now.title: Zig is flying blind — HubSpot pipeline data stale since July 6
act_now.detail: Zig's hubspot skill is missing from runtime. Last live pull July 6. 51 of 68 renewal districts (72%) still in 'To Be Renewed.' No Jun/Jul closed-won data. September 1 is 6 weeks away and we're reading pipeline from cached May 13 brain data. This is not a 'Woz will fix it' situation — this is a 'Steve needs to unblock it' situation.
act_now.action: Direct Raju/Woz: restore Zig's HubSpot MCP access today. Live pipeline data is before any other fleet work.

act_now.title: SIS roster bug blocking 5 districts — Granger can't go live
act_now.detail: Large SFTP uploads timeout mid-processing. Granger: 345 students in, 1,440 of 4,418 enrollments failed. Forney: 0 students across 30 campuses. Any district >1.5MB roster file is blocked. Product feedback flagged this morning — needs Scout priority. Proposed deadline: Tue Jul 21.
act_now.action: Confirm with Sarah it's a blocker, route to Scout with owner + deadline. This is a go-live blocker for new districts.

act_now.title: Design/Brand v2 rollout — need two-tier ACK closure from Ford
act_now.detail: All 7 C-levels confirmed receipt. But tier-2 (skills-cite-readable-canon) is blocked on Woz's G-Brain source-scoping fix. Ford needs to report completion with both tiers distinguished. Steve added Beacon to the cascade — training material must include brand canon.
act_now.action: Ask Ford for the two-tier completion report. Confirm Beacon got the onboarding material directive.

why.note: Faith's moment is embedded in the brand canon now — `bookmarked-founder` is one of the five CEO-locked pages. The WHY is in the architecture.
